title: After the Japanese Derby: Bonding over Mutual Losses

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Mejiro Palmer and Ines Fujin both burn out and
end up losing the Japanese Derby.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Despite their loss, they compliment each other,
and a tenuous friendship starts to grow between
them.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
That night, after reviewing the day's race,
Daitaku Helios seems to have come up with some
kind of "god-tier" race plan.
